arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim points finger of blame for Rasmus Hojlund goal drought
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund hasn't scored a single goal in any competition in 2025 and Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has given his take on the striker's struggles

Ruben Amorim takes on the same opponents from his first game in charge, in what has been a tough start to life in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Ipswich – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome a relegation-threatened Ipswich Town to Old Trafford this evening. A spirited second-half display from the Red Devils helped them salvage a point away to Everton on Saturday. Ruben Amorim had no fresh injury news to report in his post-match press conference. arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sends Man United fans emotional message as he makes future admission
arts.sum: Former Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag has looked back on his time in England with fond memories

arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly stepping up their interest in the potential £40million transfer of Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford told Man Utd will block stunning transfer - 'Never in a million years'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford left Manchester United for Aston Villa in January, joining them on loan, with the forward told his parent club were never going to sign off on him moving to a rival

arts.ttl: Man Utd face Sociedad, Spurs play AZ Alkmaar & Rangers meet Fenerbahce
arts.sum: Manchester United face Real Sociedad in the last 16 of the Europa League, while Tottenham play AZ Alkmaar and Rangers meet Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: Man Utd FORCED to make Victor Osimhen move
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko, Alexander Isak and Liam Delap have all been associated with a move to Old Trafford, yet the Red Devils are set to miss out on all three, with the net result being that Osimhen is the last man standing. “I think at this stage, Chelsea are front-runners for Liam Delap, and the expectation is that whether Ipswich go down or stay up, he will likely leave this summer,” transfer news expert Ben Jacobs told GMS .

arts.ttl: Man United vs Ipswich Town Premier League clash predicted as glaring issue highlighted again
